when you trigger death resistance you get a silver key dawn (tawil's rouse card) placed into your hand
Either way, it's another buff to aqua realm
75% of your total max of 300% and increase up to 10% max hp max
there's a healing change in 'chieftain battles' that reduces healing after you've healed a certain amount but increases your death resistance by 25% (not clear if it's additive or multiplicative)
